tone_guidelines: Use high-energy, motivational language. Be direct and actionable. Speak with authority and confidence. Audience expects expertise, science-backed advice, and zero fluff.
audience_archetype: Fitness enthusiasts and gym beginners seeking actionable, science-backed advice for body recomposition, strength, and health

platform_hints.youtube: Focus on demonstration + explanation. Use B-roll of exercises. Time-lapse transformations hook viewers.
platform_hints.tiktok: Fast cuts, on-screen text callouts, transformation hooks. Before/after format dominates.
platform_hints.instagram: Visual-first with progress photos. Carousel for workout routines and meal plans.
platform_hints.linkedin: Fitness entrepreneurship, coaching business insights, wellness industry trends.
platform_hints.podcast: Long-form deep dives on training methodology, nutrition science, and recovery protocols.
platform_hints.blog: SEO-optimized guides with exercise databases, calorie calculators, and workout templates.
platform_hints.twitter: Quick tips, controversial takes on training myths, poll-based engagement.

engagement_rules: Open with a bold claim or transformation result
Use numbers and specifics — never vague claims ('lose 5kg' not 'lose weight')
Include a direct challenge or call-to-action ('Try this for 30 days')
Reference scientific studies or expert consensus when possible
Show before/after or progress to build credibility
